title: Keel Toys 25cm Keeleco Chick
features: FEATURES: 100% Recycled with a selection of 27 amazing creatures to choose from, that home that pet you’ve always wanted!

ECO-FRIENDLY - these toys are manufactured and stuffed with rPET polyester made from 100% recycled plastic waste. Approximately 10 water bottles makes a 18cm toy, 14 bottles 25cm toy and 16 bottles a 30cm toy.
SUSTAINABLE: The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester.
SAFETY: British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable.
DESIGN: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc
description: Product Description Keeleco British Wildlife and Farm are our range of classic animals from the British Isles. Whether it’s your friendly neighbourhood fox or that sneaky squirrel that’s always in your bird feed. British wildlife is as iconic as it is diverse. Take home your piece of it now to keep forever! Safety Warning Remove all hangtags before giving to child.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎To teach children about British wildlife and sustainability
